'''Terno''' was a [[Kitonak/Legends|Kitonak]] [[Musician/Legends|musician]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A vital member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] in the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]], Terno led a Kitonak band in a traveling circus that was actually a front for the Alliance. Terno was the leader of the Alliance team, although publicly, Terno was merely the director of the band. They hired a [[Tramp freighter/Legends|tramp freighter]] to transport them from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adarlon/Legends|Adarlon]] to the [[Yelsain/Legends|Yelsain]], searching for information regarding the whereabouts of their leader, [[Drun Cairnwick/Legends|Drun Cairnwick]], and attempting to reestablish a Rebel network.
